# fly_certificate (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an existing TLS certificate for a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_certificate" "example" {
  app      = "my-existing-app"
  hostname = "example.com"
}

output "cert_status" {
  value = data.fly_certificate.example.check_status
}

output "dns_target" {
  value = data.fly_certificate.example.dns_validation_target
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the application the certificate belongs to.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the certificate.

### Read-Only

- `certificate_authority` (String) The certificate authority that issued the certificate.
- `check_status` (String) The validation check status of the certificate.
- `dns_validation_hostname` (String) The hostname to use for DNS validation.
- `dns_validation_target` (String) The target to use for DNS validation.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the certificate.
- `issued_at` (String) The timestamp when the certificate was issued.
- `source` (String) The source of the certificate.
